# Theme Engine

The Theme Engine provides custom color themes for Root Communications with:

- **OKLCH palette generation** — perceptually uniform color manipulation
- **8 built-in presets** — Crimson, Cosmic Smoothie, Loki, Marine, Oreo, Sakura, Ember, and Native
- **Live preview** — Real-time color updates as you adjust
- **Light theme support** — Direction-aware palette adaptation
- **Custom colors** — HSV color picker for full customization
